'''M2398''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]], in the [[M2398 system|M2398]] [[Star system/Legends|system]], near [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s territory. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by the [[Blood Nest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] which was controlled by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. Furthermore, it was the place where [[Wraith Squadron]] suffered its first loss, [[Jesmin Ackbar]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}}
